name: Steamed Squash Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 small slender zucchini, cut into 1/4-inch rounds and parboiled for 1 minute
Grated zest and juice of two large limes
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the zucchini for 1 minute, then drain and pat dry.
2. Divide the zucchini among four dinner plates.
3. Arrange the zucchini in concentric circles on each plate.
4. Combine the olive oil, lime zest and juice, cumin, cardamom, and garlic in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Taste and adjust the seasoning for acidity if needed.
6. Spoon the dressing over the zucchini.
7. When the chicken is done, place it skin side up over the zucchini.
Yield: 4 servings
